name: StoryGen
description:
StoryGen Remade is my rework of the original bot, StoryBot. You are recommended to use this model as its definition is much more organised and articulated.

This bot is not for roleplaying.

A lot of times, bots like these are absolutely ass, and will be, it's AI what do you expect

also if you use this on actual works just know that i will be under your bed and i will most definitely slime you out

TUTORIAL/TIPS

  1. In order to set a genre, use "/f(genre is A or B)", put the genres in caps! My preferences are 'COMEDY and SLICE OF LIFE'.

  2. To lead your story in a certain direction, just interfere! It doesn't need any commands, but /f() and italic works in their unique way.

  3. NSFW generations can have some more glitter using /nsfw – the bot will specifically focus on NSFW scenes.

  4. Fairytale dialogue(overdramatic dialogue) can be easily avoided using "/f(genre is COMEDY) for some reason.

  5. Don't use these generations as actual literature and post them or I will kill you.

  6. If you have tips, you can comment them, and I might add them.

–––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
